# Generic graph planning survey

- Claim: Graph planning methods improve benchmark control, but baseline coverage and runtime cost need source-backed verification.
- Gap: Evaluation protocols for graph planning often omit direct baselines, F1 metric reporting, and reproducibility constraints.
- Idea: Use reusable tool-use memory infrastructure as an implementation scaffold after closest-work checks.

External notes mention the GraphControl benchmark, F1 metric, Transformer base model, and public code availability as candidate assets.
